tasks.title: Review reply suggestions
Check engagement log & respond
Review AI briefing & act on insights

With 0 new subscribers in the last 24 hours and only 5 total cold leads, Harvest should personally post 2–3 value-packed ICT trading tips in targeted Facebook Groups or Thai forex communities today to drive fresh opt-ins.
Reach out directly to 3–5 past students or contacts on LINE or Telegram asking for a short testimonial or referral, since there are zero hot leads and no recent payments to work with.

Create a limited-time offer or flash promotion (e.g., 500 THB discount valid 48 hours) and manually announce it via Harvest's personal Instagram Stories or LINE Official Account to stimulate immediate payment activity.

With 4 Shorts currently rendering, plan a manual push notification or story on Harvest's social accounts the moment they publish to capitalize on early engagement momentum and drive traffic back to the opt-in page.
Review reply suggestions
Check engagement log & respond
Review AI briefing & act on insights

Reach out personally to all 5 cold subscribers via a direct 1-on-1 Telegram or LINE message from Harvest introducing himself and offering a free 15-minute strategy call to accelerate movement through the funnel.

With 11 YouTube Shorts ready to publish, manually select the top 3 most compelling ones and schedule them across the next 3 days with custom thumbnails and keyword-optimized titles to boost early traction.

Launch a new paid traffic initiative — set up a small Facebook or TikTok ad campaign targeting Bangkok-based traders with a $10–$20/day budget to drive fresh subscribers since zero new leads joined yesterday.

Create and post 1 personal behind-the-scenes story from Harvest on Instagram or Facebook today — showing a real trade, P&L, or student win — to build trust and generate organic lead inquiries beyond the automated content.
